description: Affordable housing and credit-linked subsidy for urban households.
Cashless hospitalization coverage for eligible families.
whereToApply: Ayushman Mitra / empanelled hospitals; state health authority enrollment camps; online verification where enabled.

applicationWindow.notes: Beneficiary identification is continuous; hospitalization is cashless once verified.

renewalCycle: Re-verification as per state / ABPMJAY guidelines; keep ABHA and family details current.
renewalRequirements: Report changes in family composition or address through authorized centers.

benefitEstimate.narrative: Cashless secondary and tertiary care for eligible families as per scheme package rates.

description: Universal banking access with zero-balance account facility.

ministryOrDepartment: Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority
description: Pension scheme for workers in unorganized sector.
Affordable accident insurance coverage.
Direct income support to eligible farmer families.
whereToApply: PM-KISAN portal (online), Common Service Centres, or agriculture department / authorized verification channels as per state workflow.

applicationWindow.notes: Enrollment is continuous; installment releases follow GoI-defined cycles.

renewalCycle: Periodic self-declaration / e-KYC updates as notified; maintain valid bank and land linkage.
renewalRequirements: Update changes in landholding, bank account, or eligibility status when requested on portal.

benefitEstimate.unit: per year (illustrative; verify current GoI rates)
benefitEstimate.narrative: Income support in installments to eligible farmer families; amounts and cycles follow official notifications.

description: Crop insurance against yield and weather risks.
Savings account scheme for girl child welfare and education.

ministryOrDepartment: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Maternity benefit support for pregnant and lactating women.
Guaranteed wage employment in rural areas.

ministryOrDepartment: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Skill development and certification programs for employability.
Collateral-free loans for micro-enterprises.
Institutional credit support for women and marginalized entrepreneurs.
Functional household tap connection and safe drinking water access.
Sanitation and hygiene mission with household and community facilities.
Plan scheme strengthening agricultural development, infrastructure, and productivity at state and district levels.
guidanceSteps: Submit project through state nodal agency

description: Strengthening public health systems, primary care, maternal and child health, and disease control across India.
Free vaccination schedule protecting infants and children against vaccine-preventable diseases.

schemeName: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Affordable life insurance coverage linked to bank accounts for eligible subscribers.
Area-based urban development improving infrastructure, mobility, governance, and quality of life in selected cities.
guidanceSteps: Review live projects and citizen services
Apply where citizen onboarding is open

description: Legal entitlement to subsidised food grains through the targeted public distribution system for eligible households.
guidanceSteps: Apply at fair price shop or civil supplies office
Collect ration card and use e-PoS

description: Highest subsidised food grain allocation for households in the deepest poverty bracket under TPDS.
Conditional cash assistance promoting institutional delivery and reducing maternal and neonatal mortality.
guidanceSteps: Claim JSY benefit post institutional delivery

description: Free delivery and newborn care services including drugs, diagnostics, diet, and transport in public health facilities.
benefitsOffered: Free maternal and newborn care package

ministryOrDepartment: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade
description: Ecosystem support for recognised startups including self-certification, fast-track IP, and access to schemes and networks.
guidanceSteps: Explore linked schemes and compliance benefits

description: National programme for digital infrastructure, governance and services on demand, and digital empowerment of citizens.
requiredDocuments: Aadhaar or identity for service-specific onboarding

description: National optical fibre network aiming to connect gram panchayats and improve rural broadband access.
guidanceSteps: Check GP connectivity status with district administration
Coordinate with service providers for last-mile access
Use BharatNet-linked Wi-Fi or BBNL routes where available

schemeName: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS)
ministryOrDepartment: Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: Tamil Nadu state health insurance providing cashless hospitalisation at empanelled hospitals for eligible families, aligned with state income and residency criteria.
guidanceSteps: Verify eligibility on CMCHIS portal or e-Seva
Receive card / reference for cashless admission
Use only empanelled hospitals for covered procedures
whereToApply: CMCHIS portal, e-Seva centres, district health / insurance facilitation centres as notified by the Government of Tamil Nadu.

applicationWindow.notes: Enrolment subject to state notifications; renew or update family details when advised.

renewalCycle: Per policy year or state circular; verify on official portal.
renewalRequirements: Update income, address, or family composition when requested to avoid claim disruption.

benefitEstimate.unit: annual coverage per family (approximate ceiling — confirm current GO)
benefitEstimate.narrative: Cashless coverage up to approximately ₹5 lakh per family per year for eligible procedures at empanelled hospitals.

supportContacts.name: CMCHIS / TN Health
supportContacts.address: Directorate of Medical & Rural Health Services / Health Department, Tamil Nadu

ministryOrDepartment: Health & Family Welfare Department, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: Tamil Nadu initiative for immediate treatment support to road traffic and other accident victims through designated emergency care pathways.

documentRequirements.label: MLC / police or hospital intimation (as applicable)

guidanceSteps: Reach nearest government-notified emergency facility after accident
Hospital activates scheme pathway per state protocol
Family completes follow-up documentation if requested
whereToApply: Designated government and empanelled emergency hospitals in Tamil Nadu — not a pre-enrolment retail application in most cases.

applicationWindow.notes: Triggered at time of emergency per operational guidelines.

renewalCycle: Not applicable per incident; policy terms follow state SOP.

benefitEstimate.narrative: Supports immediate treatment costs per approved package rates and duration (verify current GO for caps and inclusions).

ministryOrDepartment: Social Welfare & Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: State marriage assistance including financial aid and gold (Thalikku Thangam) components for eligible women from economically weaker households meeting scheme conditions.

documentRequirements.label: Education proof (where minimum education is mandated)

guidanceSteps: Confirm current eligibility circular (income, age, education)
Apply through Taluk office / e-Seva as notified
whereToApply: Revenue / Social Welfare Taluk office, e-Seva, or online portal when enabled for your district.

applicationWindow.notes: Application windows may be announced yearly — check district SWD notice.

renewalCycle: One-time benefit per eligible marriage event under rules.
renewalRequirements: Re-apply only if a fresh eligible event occurs under scheme rules.

benefitEstimate.narrative: Financial grant and gold component as per prevailing Government Order (amount varies by category and year).

ministryOrDepartment: Social Welfare & Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: Monthly financial assistance for education and welfare support for eligible orphaned or vulnerable children under state guidelines.
guidanceSteps: Contact District Child Protection Unit / Social Welfare unit
Open or link bank account for DBT
Submit renewal proofs each academic year if required
whereToApply: District Social Welfare / DCPU as per Tamil Nadu operational guidelines.

applicationWindow.notes: Subject to verification backlog and fund availability.

renewalCycle: Academic or annual renewal as per circular.
renewalRequirements: School continuation certificate and alive / residence verification.

benefitEstimate.narrative: Monthly stipend amount per current GO; verify at district office.

schemeName: Tamil Nadu Gig Workers Welfare Initiatives
ministryOrDepartment: Labour Welfare & Skill Development Department, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: State framework for registered gig and platform workers including support for EV subsidy pathways, insurance coverage, and welfare linkage where notified.

documentRequirements.label: Gig worker registration / ID (Sevar ID or equivalent)

guidanceSteps: Register on Tamil Nadu gig / labour welfare portal when live
Apply for notified EV or insurance window
whereToApply: Labour department portal, e-Seva, or urban local body kiosks as per current GO.

applicationWindow.notes: EV and insurance sub-windows open per government announcement.

renewalRequirements: Update platform earnings band and vehicle details when rules change.

benefitEstimate.narrative: Subsidy and insurance values are notification-specific; check active Tamil Nadu labour welfare circulars.

ministryOrDepartment: Finance Department, Government of Tamil Nadu
description: Defined contribution–linked assured pension architecture for Tamil Nadu state government employees as per state enactment and rules.
guidanceSteps: Submit TAPS option form within joining window
whereToApply: Through Drawing & Disbursing Officer (DDO) and treasury workflow for eligible Tamil Nadu government servants.

applicationWindow.notes: Typically at joining or notified switch window — confirm with HR.

renewalCycle: Monthly contribution via salary deduction until service ends.
renewalRequirements: Update nomination on family status change.

benefitEstimate.narrative: Pension amount depends on service, contribution, and rules of the Assured Pension Scheme — use official calculator when published.

supportContacts.name: Treasury / Pension cell
supportContacts.address: Directorate of Treasuries & Accounts, Tamil Nadu
